prompt: Edit the image 1 by directly pasting the image 2 (edged newpapers) on the top of image 1.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Superimpose the entire content of image 2 onto image 1, aligning the top edge of image 2 with the top edge of image 1. Image 2 features two sections of old newspapers with torn edges, one at the top and one at the bottom, separated by a wide blank white space in the center.
objects: Top section of old newspapers with torn edges
Bottom section of old newspapers with torn edges
Miscellaneous images and logos (e.g., Starbucks logo, pencils)
